ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-05-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Warren Woo appearing for executor. Counsel has filed a declaration regarding reimbursement of additional interest to the estate. He will be filing the petition for final distribution with waiver of accounting. Court wants a copy of the closing bank statement. This status is off calendar. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Floyd Butler. Clerk: Ella Yip.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-01-2006 Continued To Sep-05-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearence by Warren Tse-Yan Woo, atty. for petitioner
Attorney to perpare new accounting and final distribution. No appearence if filed before 9/5/06.
Judge:John Dearman, Clerk:Larrisa Dotson, Rptr:Christina Paxton, Baliff:Mizota

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-18-2006 Continued To Aug-01-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Warren Woo appearing for executor. Counsel has filed his declaration yesterday. He presents a copy to the court for review. He is working on the petition for final distribution. He has all the waivers of account. Matter is continued to 8/1. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Teena Paxton CSR#1558. Clerk: Ella Yip.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-07-2006 Continued To Jul-18-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Warren Woo appearing for executor. Counsel informs the court that he has returned the fees with interest to the estate. He will need more time to file the petition for final distribution. He will file a declaration on the return of fees. Matter is continued to 7/18. If petition is filed, no appearance is required. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Lois Baty.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution

Petition To Authorize Compromise Of Claim By Estate Homequest Realty And Walter Zhovreboff
Off Calendar Feb-15-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Warren Woo appearing for the petitioner. Fees were paid without prior court order. counsel will reimburse the fees with interest. Court is setting a status hearing on 4/19 for filing of petition for final distribution. Both matters granted. Two orders signed in open court. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.
